info.name: Indori Poha
info.description: Indori poha (poha of indore) is a type of flattened (beaten) rice that is likely to have originated in indian metropolis of indore. It contains steamed poha (flattened rice) and is usually served with a unique combination of sev , special poha masala (jeeravan ) sliced onions and lemon slice.

info.name: Khaman Dhokla  250 GMS
info.description: Khaman is a savoury snack from india that originates from gujarat.[1] it is a steamed sponge with a fluffy consistency, often served with a garnish of fresh chopped coriander leaves.

info.name: 2 Poha + 250 Gm Khaman Dhokla
info.description: A delightful combination of fluffy poha and soft khaman dhokla, perfect for a satisfying breakfast.

info.name: Khaman Dhokla  250 GMS ( GUJRATI KHAMAN )
info.description: A light and fluffy Gujarati breakfast favorite bursting with flavor.

info.name: Jalebi + Rabdi
info.description: When the jalebis and rabdi enters your mouth and crush it in your mouth, the cocktail of sugar syrup and rabdi with crackling sound of jalebi makes you to go for another one. Your desire to have many more continues and you are never satisfied. the specialty | CHEF'S SPECIAL |

info.description: Khandvi Is A Soft, Melt In The Mouth, Spiced And Seasoned Gram Flour Rolls. A Favorite Snack From The Gujarati cusine

info.name: Jodhpuri Aloo Pyaz Kachori
info.description: Aloo pyaz kachori or onion potato dumplings are popular indian snack with crispy and flaky texture on the outside and spicy, delightful and flavorful filling on the inside. I bet you just can't stop after eating one

info.name: Punjabi Kadhi + Jeera Rice (Chawal )
info.description: A comforting and flavorful combination of tender rice and tangy kadhi with pakodas a delightful vegetarian meal from Mother's Recipe Meal Combos. COMBO CONTAINS 2 PAKODAS WITH KADHI AND JEERA RICE .

info.name: Suji Pani Puri
info.description: A delectable variation of the classic pani puri, Suji Pani Puri adds a delightful twist with its unique semolina shell.

info.name: Suji Dahi Puri (SPDP)
info.description: Authentic sooji golgappe ( delhi wale ) stuffed with punjabi aloo masala served with thick creamy curd sonth and chutney garnished with barik sev and coriander leaves.
